channel.title: Anto Subash - terminal
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: Setting up oh-my-posh and PSReadLine in PowerShell
item.description: In this post we will see how to setup the oh-my-posh and PSReadLine with PowerShell.

item.title: Set up Wsl with zsh and oh-my-zsh
item.description: In this post we will see how to setup zsh shell in the wsl and use oh-my-zsh.

item.title: Set up Windows Terminal with PoshGit, oh-my-posh and Cascadia Code PL
item.description: In this post we will see how to setup windows terminal with PoshGit and oh-my-posh to make the terminal more productive
